subcodes.first_line: From the rustling of the morning breezes, wafting through the gardens of inner meaning, this most exalted Word was heard: blessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از هزیز اریاح سحری که از ریاض معانی مرور نمود این کلمه علیا اصغا شد طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @goodly deeds; actions
